Added input sampling and opacity blending
Lorenz attractor now blends with input instead of replacing
Spiral effect now overlays on previous layer
Cellular automaton blends with input
Boids flocking now blends with previous layer
Wave simulation overlays on input
Smoke blends with background

fixed_shaders.blending_added: hit ? mix(inputColor.rgb, hit_color, alpha * opacity) : inputColor.rgb
fixed_shaders.notes: Mandelbulb blends when hit, passes through input on miss
Cloud and rain blend with input
Domain warping effect blends with input
Crystal now blends using existing transmission with opacity control
SmoothLife cellular automaton overlays on input
Perlin noise terrain blends with previous layer

fixed_shaders.blending_added: hit ? mix(inputColor.rgb, generatedColor, hitAlpha * opacity) : inputColor.rgb
fixed_shaders.notes: Gas giant sphere blends when hit, passes through on miss
Chladni plate cymatics blends with input
Worley noise voronoi blends with input

skipped_shaders.reason: Already correctly samples from readTexture and blends with baseColor at the start - no fix needed

pattern_summary.common_fix_pattern: Add: 1) inputColor = textureSampleLevel(readTexture,...), 2) inputDepth = textureSampleLevel(readDepthTexture,...), 3) opacity variable, 4) final blend using mix(inputColor.rgb, generatedColor, alpha * opacity)
pattern_summary.depth_passthrough_pattern: textureStore(writeDepthTexture, coord, vec4<f32>(inputDepth, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0)) or blended depth

all_fixed_shaders_now: Sample from readDepthTexture for depth pass-through
Write blended color with proper alpha
Pass through or blend depth values
changes_made.key_benefit: Generative shaders now properly layer on top of previous effects instead of completely replacing them, enabling proper multi-slot shader stacking

notes: All 22 generative shaders now support proper layer blending. The opacity values (typically 0.85-0.9) ensure generative effects are visible while still allowing previous layers to show through. This fixes the 'superseding' problem where generative shaders would completely obscure image/video sources or previous shader effects.
